feedback.technicalIssues: I did not encounter any issues.
feedback.confusingParts: The only confusing part was I had to click on the game box prior to hitting enter for the games to begin.
feedback.suggestions: I do not have any suggestions at this time.
feedback.funCriteria: Whether I oould actually play it was a huge factor for me.  If I was really bad at it, it wasn't fun.
